Hexschool Hotel API (freyja): Full Backend Deployment Guide

Maybe You Should Know a Bit About CI/CD: Deploying to Render.com with CD

Knowing a bit about CI/CD is genuinely useful as a developer — even on a side project, you can put it to work. This post covers what CI/CD actually is, the YAML basics behind GitHub Actions, how workflows are structured (Event → Runner → Job → Step), and a full walkthrough of building a PR-check workflow (ESLint + Jest) and a deploy workflow that ships to Render.com via Deploy Hooks.

A quick note on building a simple WebSocket chatroom. I'll mainly use Express as the example, with sample code at the end.

Step-by-Step: Uploading Files to Firebase Storage with Node.js
I previously shared "The Complete Express + Imgur Upload Tutorial", so this time I'm covering Firebase Storage upload. I'll walk through every step clearly because this one's a bit more complex.
Deploy Your Node.js Project to fly.io With flyctl

A walkthrough of deploying an Express app to fly.io. After Heroku killed its free tier, fly.io became one of the alternatives worth trying. This post covers installing flyctl on macOS/Windows/Linux, registering, signing in, deploying with flyctl launch, and checking deploy status. Heads up — fly.io now requires a credit card on file even for the free tier.
A quick note on building auth / membership flow using Express + Passport.js.
The Complete Express + Imgur Upload Tutorial

Imgur is a really handy online photo album service with free image hosting. It's great for upload practice during dev, or even as your blog's image library. So here's a tutorial on Imgur image upload with Express.
While working with Express recently I noticed body-parser is now marked as deprecated. Here's a note on how to resolve it.
